title: thlaspi procumbens
intro: Thlaspi procumbens, also known as creeping whitlowgrass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Thlaspi procumbens include its ability to reduce inflammation and combat infections, as well as its potential to support the immune system. Thlaspi procumbens is typically prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, although it can also be used as a topical application for its anti-inflammatory properties.
